turns.user_message: My friend said I seemed off lately, and now I can't stop thinking about it. I keep wondering what they really meant.
I'm analyzing every little thing I did around them, looking for a reason. My chest feels tight just replaying it.
I'm convinced I messed everything up and they're all talking about me. I can barely breathe when I think about seeing them again.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This just started recently.
